creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
I noticed the same issue from pkg-fallout [1]. According to the log, I guess the failure is caused by ports 4bd3073300d1a4d245f7cbc06923d6985af7f8a6 (textproc/py-towncrier 24.7.1 update).

[1] https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/package19/data/140amd64-default-build-as-user/39a5c2d0b3e6/logs/py311-pip-23.3.2_1.log
